notes: Opta firmware + Control Suite hardening. Serial number, taught positions and network config now PERSIST across power-off (dedicated on-board flash store, write-verified) - fixes the serial resetting to 0 and the 'flash config/position failed' errors. Hardware watchdog auto-recovers the Opta from any firmware hang (a reset forces plasma OFF, fail-safe). New 'reboot' and relay 'clicktest' console commands. App: Run recorder layout cleaned up; station serial number now reads reliably from the Opta.
